column20: What do you think is your biggest challenge when it comes to managing your study time?
Overloaded assignment or too much time spend on making the assignment done sometimes consuming my time to study properly.
Dealing with group assignment that takes a lot of time when it comes to discussion and report
Lack of focus and interest in the subject i’m studying. Other than that, constantly want snacks and can’t continue study without them.
delaying assignments, spending too much time on phones , not making a clear study plan
procrastination which i like to delay my studies and also distracted by my phone
Feeling sleepy everytime i want to study
Cant control myself from social media
Distraction from mobile devices and too comfortable environment such as studying in bedroom

I think the perceived notion of a lack of time. When in actuality the hurdle is actually just starting. There’s plenty of time even with all the extra things we do. It’s just whether we want to optimise it or not
Always procrastinated studying until last minute, and feeling overwhelmed if I do study
usualy, I tend to socialize with people before I study so that I aint feel sleepy. But Then, excessive time to socialize made me lack of time to study properly.
Balancing commitments outside university with study time.

My biggest challenge when managing my study time is when i have to balance my studies with extracurricular activities, time with friends and personal free time. When i have too many assignment deadlines, events and other commitments at the same times, it becomes difficult to manage my time effectively
social media was my biggest distraction when it comes about managing times
Maintaining consistent focus and avoiding distractions
A lot of distractions and programmes to attend
feeling of overwhelmed, social media, anxiety, short focus span
Struggling to find the drive to start or finish tasks, especially when they are difficult or boring.
I have so many programs to attend, at the same time have classes and tutorials almost every single day
Procrastinating until It behind my scehdule
the urge to play video games
Study without technology to increase productivity but the notes are online

My biggest challenge in managing my study time is having a very packed class schedule and multiple assignments that need to be completed at the same time. Besides finishing assignments, I also need to prepare my notes and do revision, which sometimes makes it difficult to manage my time effectively.
I got distracted a lot and sometimes feel demotivated and overwhelmed a day or 2 before my paper (often got last paper syndrome too)
not to open my social media
lazy to study and friends ask for play games
distractions and staying focused while studying.
When i dont do social media limits.

I don't do much clubs / extra-curriculum activities or have other things besides studying so finding some free times to study were never the problem. I think the main issue for me was my lack of disipline. I was always so easily distracted with other things, because I have a short attention span. That was also why I always ended up cramming 1-2 days before the exam.
When we have coursework and assignment , we really need to manage our time well in order to catch up everything.
Maybe when I'm distracted playing on my cellphone, it's hard for me to divide my time between playing and studying.

My biggest challenge in managing my study time is staying consistent and focused. Sometimes I get distracted or delay studying when I have other activities. I am trying to improve by planning my schedule better and setting clear priorities.
It's hard to focus when the subject required a lot of reading.
Always trying to fit unimportant plans such as hangouts or travels although I have no one to hangout with and have no money to go anywhere :D
The challenge is how I maintain to stay discipline on study
Sleeping because I will literally over slept
Didnt plan the time well. For example not following the planned schedule.
distraction towards social medias and the feeling of sleepiness
always easily distracted by the phone
I need to manage my time between studying, personal activities, and staying focused when I have many assignments
